metadata.name: FACT_PROTECT_TRANSACTIONS
metadata.comment:
This table contains all the transactions received by Flashbots Protect RPC that are seen landed onchain, including the privacy setting user or application set when sending them.  Read more about Flashbots Protect from [documentation](https://docs.flashbots.net/flashbots-protect/quick-start) and [website](https://protect.flashbots.net/)!
Please reach out to the Flashbots team for any data discrepancies or questions.

TX_HASH.name: TX_HASH
TX_HASH.comment: The Ethereum transaction hash of the protect transaction.

FROM_ADDRESS.name: FROM_ADDRESS
FROM_ADDRESS.comment: The Ethereum address of the sender initiating the transaction.

TO_ADDRESS.name: TO_ADDRESS
TO_ADDRESS.comment: The Ethereum address of the recipient of the transaction.

PUBLIC_MEMPOOL.name: PUBLIC_MEMPOOL
PUBLIC_MEMPOOL.comment: A boolean indicating whether the transaction was initially visible in the public mempool. Source [mempool_dumpster](https://mempool-dumpster.flashbots.net/index.html)

CREATED_AT_BLOCK_NUMBER.name: CREATED_AT_BLOCK_NUMBER
CREATED_AT_BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number at which the transaction was created (first received by Flashbots server). Note - Due to some reorg/simulation issues, there are some rows where `created_at_block_number` > `included_block_number`

INCLUDED_BLOCK_NUMBER.name: INCLUDED_BLOCK_NUMBER
INCLUDED_BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The block number in which the transaction was included in the blockchain.

TX_ID.name: TX_ID
TX_ID.comment: A row number partitioned by (`tx_hash`, `created_at_block_number`, `included_block_number`) to use as part of the deterministic id for transactions who were submitted multiple times at same block, with different shared configs

HINTS_SELECTED.name: HINTS_SELECTED
HINTS_SELECTED.comment: The hints shared by the user for public streaming to searchers in the MEV-share orderflow auction (OFA).

NUM_OF_BUILDERS_SHARED.name: NUM_OF_BUILDERS_SHARED
NUM_OF_BUILDERS_SHARED.comment: The number of block builders the transaction was shared with, higher number will likely help faster inclusion speed onchain.

REFUND_PERCENT.name: REFUND_PERCENT
REFUND_PERCENT.comment: The percentage of OFA backrun profits refunded to the sender (user). The rest can be kept by builders or bided to payout to validator. Flashbots builders keeps 0 profit and send it to validator in the end of block payment transaction.

metadata.name: FACT_PROPOSALS
metadata.comment: A fact view that contains all proposals on Snapshot and related information.

CREATED_AT.name: CREATED_AT
CREATED_AT.comment: The time at which the proposal was generated.

PROPOSAL_TITLE.name: PROPOSAL_TITLE
PROPOSAL_TITLE.comment: The title or name of the proposal.

PROPOSAL_AUTHOR.name: PROPOSAL_AUTHOR
PROPOSAL_AUTHOR.comment: The address of the wallet that wrote the proposal.

CHOICES.name: CHOICES
CHOICES.comment: An array containing the voting options on the proposal.

DELAY.name: DELAY
DELAY.comment: The default number of hours of voting delay for the space. The voting delay is the time between proposal submission and the opening of voting.

QUORUM.name: QUORUM
QUORUM.comment: The minimum amount of voting power for a proposal to pass.

VOTING_PERIOD.name: VOTING_PERIOD
VOTING_PERIOD.comment: The default time in hours within a space for a proposal to be open for voting.

VOTING_TYPE.name: VOTING_TYPE
VOTING_TYPE.comment: The type of voting system used for this space. If this column is not null, the same voting system will be used for all proposals in this space.

PROPOSAL_START_TIME.name: PROPOSAL_START_TIME
PROPOSAL_START_TIME.comment: The time at which voting on the proposal begins.

PROPOSAL_END_TIME.name: PROPOSAL_END_TIME
PROPOSAL_END_TIME.comment: The time at which voting on the proposal ends.

SPACE_ID.name: SPACE_ID
SPACE_ID.comment: A way to identify which group, or space, on Snapshot a proposal belongs to.

NETWORK.name: NETWORK
NETWORK.comment: The default network or blockchain used for the space.

NETWORK_ID.name: NETWORK_ID
NETWORK_ID.comment: The default network or blockchain unique identifier used for the space.

PROPOSAL_ID.name: PROPOSAL_ID
PROPOSAL_ID.comment: A unique identifier for the proposal being voted on.

metadata.name: FACT_MEVSHARE_TRANSACTIONS
metadata.comment:
This table records all the landed backrun transactions on MEV-share, and its original user transaction that is being backrun, as well as the refund transaction where block builder send searcher's refund back to originating user.  These 3 transactions are settled in a bundle with the order of `(user_tx, backrun_tx, refund_tx)`.
MEV-share is the Order Flow Auction (OFA) product from Flashbots, resharing MEV profits back to users, with parameterized privacy features.  MEV-share inherit orderflow coming from Flashbots Protect RPC endpoint. Read more in [Flashbots docs](https://docs.flashbots.net/flashbots-protect/mev-share)!
Please reach out to the Flashbots team for any data discrepancies or questions.

BLOCK_NUMBER.name: BLOCK_NUMBER
BLOCK_NUMBER.comment: The number of the block in which transactions were included.

BLOCK_TIME.name: BLOCK_TIME
BLOCK_TIME.comment: The timestamp for when the block was mined.

BLOCK_HASH.name: BLOCK_HASH
BLOCK_HASH.comment: The hash of the block in which the MEV-share transactions landed.

EXTRA_DATA.name: EXTRA_DATA
EXTRA_DATA.comment: Additional data included in the block, often used for identifying the block builder.

FEE_RECIPIENT_ADDRESS.name: FEE_RECIPIENT_ADDRESS
FEE_RECIPIENT_ADDRESS.comment: The Ethereum address of the recipient of block rewards, which can be the block builder or validator.

BUNDLE_ID.name: BUNDLE_ID
BUNDLE_ID.comment: A row number partitioned by (`user_tx_hash`, `backrun_tx_hash`) to use as part of the deterministic id for refund bundles.

USER_TX_HASH.name: USER_TX_HASH
USER_TX_HASH.comment: The Ethereum hash of the user's protect transaction.

USER_TX_FROM.name: USER_TX_FROM
USER_TX_FROM.comment: The Ethereum address of the sender of the protect transaction.

USER_TX_TO.name: USER_TX_TO
USER_TX_TO.comment: The Ethereum address of the recipient of the protect transaction.

BACKRUN_TX_HASH.name: BACKRUN_TX_HASH
BACKRUN_TX_HASH.comment: The Ethereum hash of the transaction that backran the user's transaction in MEV-share OFA.

BACKRUN_TX_FROM.name: BACKRUN_TX_FROM
BACKRUN_TX_FROM.comment: The Ethereum address of the sender of the backrunning transaction.

BACKRUN_TX_TO.name: BACKRUN_TX_TO
BACKRUN_TX_TO.comment: The Ethereum address of the recipient of the backrunning transaction.

REFUND_TX_HASH.name: REFUND_TX_HASH
REFUND_TX_HASH.comment: The Ethereum hash of the refund transaction.

REFUND_VALUE_ETH.name: REFUND_VALUE_ETH
REFUND_VALUE_ETH.comment: The amount of ETH refunded to the protect transaction, as a result of a successful OFA backrun, depending on user's refund percentage setting when sending the transaction.

metadata.name: EZ_SNAPSHOT
metadata.comment: A convenience view that contains all votes on Snapshot and information about the voting space and proposal.

ID.name: ID
ID.comment: A unique identifier assigned to a vote.

PROPOSAL_ID.name: PROPOSAL_ID
PROPOSAL_ID.comment: A unique identifier for the proposal being voted on.

VOTER.name: VOTER
VOTER.comment: The wallet address of the user that voted on a proposal.

VOTE_OPTION.name: VOTE_OPTION
VOTE_OPTION.comment: How the user voted on the proposal. Corresponds to the choices array.

VOTING_POWER.name: VOTING_POWER
VOTING_POWER.comment: The amount of voting power one holds is proportional to the amount of the token they hold.

VOTE_TIMESTAMP.name: VOTE_TIMESTAMP
VOTE_TIMESTAMP.comment: The time at which the vote was cast.

CHOICES.name: CHOICES
CHOICES.comment: An array containing the voting options on the proposal.

PROPOSAL_AUTHOR.name: PROPOSAL_AUTHOR
PROPOSAL_AUTHOR.comment: The address of the wallet that wrote the proposal.

PROPOSAL_TITLE.name: PROPOSAL_TITLE
PROPOSAL_TITLE.comment: The title or name of the proposal.

SPACE_ID.name: SPACE_ID
SPACE_ID.comment: A way to identify which group, or space, on Snapshot a proposal belongs to.

NETWORK.name: NETWORK
NETWORK.comment: The default network or blockchain used for the space.

DELAY.name: DELAY
DELAY.comment: The default number of hours of voting delay for the space. The voting delay is the time between proposal submission and the opening of voting.

QUORUM.name: QUORUM
QUORUM.comment: The minimum amount of voting power for a proposal to pass.

VOTING_PERIOD.name: VOTING_PERIOD
VOTING_PERIOD.comment: The default time in hours within a space for a proposal to be open for voting.

VOTING_TYPE.name: VOTING_TYPE
VOTING_TYPE.comment: The type of voting system used for this space. If this column is not null, the same voting system will be used for all proposals in this space.

PROPOSAL_START_TIME.name: PROPOSAL_START_TIME
PROPOSAL_START_TIME.comment: The time at which voting on the proposal begins.

PROPOSAL_END_TIME.name: PROPOSAL_END_TIME
PROPOSAL_END_TIME.comment: The time at which voting on the proposal ends.

OWNER.name: OWNER

TOP_BID.name: TOP_BID
TOP_BID.comment: Includes information about the top bid for the token, if any.

VALUATION.name: VALUATION
VALUATION.comment: Valuation of NFT, as of updated_timestamp.

UPDATED_TIMESTAMP.name: UPDATED_TIMESTAMP
UPDATED_TIMESTAMP.comment: Timestamp of the last update for the token.
